author.bio: 🦄 CSS Modules co-creator, @MelbJS organiser. ECMAScript addict, UI design enthusiast, meme dad x3 ☕ OSS / UI / design / tooling at @seekjobs 🍦🇦🇺✌🏻
author.name: Mark Dalgleish

content.text:
"There's something wrong with the website."

"What do you mean?"

"It's got a fixed width of 320px on mobile, and 1024px on desktop. It doesn't scale to fit the screen at all."

"Yeah—that's what the spec looked like."
content.html:
"There's something wrong with the website."

"What do you mean?"

"It's got a fixed width of 320px on mobile, and 1024px on desktop. It doesn't scale to fit the screen at all."

"Yeah—that's what the spec looked like."
